entries.name: Executor
entries.description: Used to execute LayerZero message payloads at the destination. Also manages fee logic, gas drop and access control.

entries.name: EndpointV2
entries.description: Part of the LayerZero messaging protocol. OApp owners can configure custom verification (MessageLib) and execution settings here.

entries.name: DelegationManager
entries.description: The DelegationManager contract is responsible for registering EigenLayer operators and managing the EigenLayer strategies delegations. The EigenDA StakeRegistry contract reads from the DelegationManager to track the total stake of each EigenDA operator.

entries.name: UpgradeableBeacon
entries.description: A beacon with an upgradeable implementation currently set as eth:0xA91F8a52F0C1b4D3fDC256fC5bEBCA4D627da392. Beacon proxy contracts pointing to this beacon will all use its implementation.

entries.name: DVN
entries.description: Defines the logic that validates LayerZero Packets for this DVN.

entries.name: SendUln302
entries.description: Send Library used by LayerZero, defining the protocol/execution of sent messages.

entries.name: ReceiveUln302
entries.description: Receive Library used by LayerZero, defining the validation of received messages.

entries.name: VerifierNetwork
entries.description: Defines the logic that validates LayerZero Packets for this DVN.
